questions.prompt: A receptionist wants to see at a glance whether each member of the six-person sales team is on a call or free. What's the right Linkus feature?
choices: Function keys configured as BLF (Busy Lamp Field) buttons, one per sales-team extension
questions.explanation: BLF function keys turn the right-hand panel of Linkus Desktop into a live availability board for the configured extensions. Green = available, red = on a call. One click to dial. Presence sync is broader and not as fast for this specific 'who's free right now?' use case.

questions.prompt: Linkus hotkeys (dial-from-anywhere) work in CTI mode as well as softphone mode.
questions.explanation: Hotkeys are a Linkus Desktop feature; the dial-selected-text behaviour works regardless of whether Linkus is the audio path (softphone mode) or just the control surface (CTI mode). The dial command is issued through Linkus; where the audio plays is a separate concern.
